headline: Is Cintas Corp. (CTAS) One of the Best QQQ Stocks to Buy Now?
summary: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) is one of the 9 Best QQQ Stocks to Buy Now. On March 25, Cintas announced financial results for FQ3 2026, where the revenue stood at $2.84 billion, representing an 8.9% increase year-over-year. Gross margin reached an all-time high of 51%, or $1.45 billion, while operating income rose 8.2% to $659.9 million. […]
